title: Redundant Telemetry Using LoRa
summary: Long-range communication system integrating MAVLink protocol with LoRa technology for UAV telemetry.
description: A redundant UAV telemetry system using ESP32 and SX1276/SX1278 LoRa modules to transmit altitude, GPS, battery, and status data as backup communication for drone operations.
result: Backup telemetry with signal quality monitoring, sequential packet validation, and low-latency data updates.

title: Pose-Striker Game
summary: Computer vision game using pose estimation for interactive gameplay.
description: An interactive game that detects player body pose in real time, compares it with reference poses, and awards points through a combo-based scoring system.
result: Real-time pose detection game with scoring, combo multiplier, and fullscreen mode.

title: Self-Balancing Robot
summary: A two-wheeled robot that automatically maintains balance using sensors combined with PID algorithm.
description: A closed-loop control robot using an MPU6050 IMU and Arduino to keep a two-wheeled platform upright through PID control and motor driver feedback.
result: Stable balancing behavior with failsafe protection and PID tuning using Ziegler-Nichols and manual tuning.

title: Automatic Sorting Tomato
summary: Automated conveyor-based system that detects tomato ripeness using color sensors.
description: A color-based sorting system using multiple TCS34725 sensors and majority voting to classify objects and control a servo actuator for sorting behavior.
result: Improved color classification reliability through redundant sensors and majority-vote fault tolerance.

title: Fuzzy Library Recommender
summary: Fuzzy logic-based book recommendation system to give personalized suggestions based on user interest.
description: A Python recommendation system that combines user genre interest, book rating, and fuzzy rules to rank book suggestions from a dataset.
result: Top recommendation list generated from fuzzy score and genre matching.

title: Fuzzy School Recommender
summary: Fuzzy logic-based school recommendation system based on distance, facilities, and extracurricular preferences.
description: A web-based school recommendation app using location, facility preference, extracurricular match, distance, and fuzzy scoring to rank schools around Malang.
result: Sorted recommendation results with suitability scores, distances, and detail pages.

title: Voice Noise Filtering
summary: Implementation of Fast Fourier Transform and filtering in MATLAB to remove background noise from voice recordings.
description: A MATLAB signal processing project that adds pink noise to audio, analyzes the frequency spectrum, and applies frequency-domain low-pass filtering.
result: Generated noisy and filtered audio outputs with spectrum comparison plots.

title: Smart Plant Care
summary: Smart plant care system using sensors to monitor soil moisture and automatically water plants when needed.
description: An ESP32-based IoT monitoring and watering system that reads environmental sensors, displays local LCD feedback, and sends data to Blynk Cloud.
result: Real-time plant monitoring dashboard with manual and automatic pump control capability.
